description_long: This is a slice of layered cake with three alternating bands of light pink and light brown, suggesting a combination of sponge and cream or mousse. The top surface is a smooth, pale pink layer adorned with a single, glossy red cherry featuring a brown stem. The cake's triangular wedge shape is cleanly defined, with sharp edges and a flat base. Small pink specks are scattered on the top, adding a touch of texture and visual interest. The overall appearance is neat and minimalist, with no additional decorations or embellishments. The cake is not displayed on any plate or stand, and all sides are exposed.
description: A neat, triangular slice of layered cake with pink and brown layers, topped with a glossy red cherry and pink specks.
description_view_0: Side view showing three distinct horizontal layers and the cherry on top.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth, pink back surface and the cherry's stem.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the layered structure and cherry.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the pointed tip, layered cross-section, and cherry centered on top.
